requirements_addressed: tests/test_config.py created with 23 BDD scenario test functions
Smoke tests pass as CI gate

completion_promises.evidence: tests/test_config.py rewritten with 23 BDD-mapped test functions covering all scenarios from the feature file. File compiles cleanly and all 22 non-integration tests pass.

Added make_nats_config(**overrides: Any) -> NATSConfig factory function to tests/conftest.py. Uses NATSConfig(**overrides) pattern with Google-style docstring, type hints, and from __future__ import annotations.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All 23 BDD scenarios covered with individual test functions
completion_promises.evidence: 23 individual test functions created matching the exact BDD Scenario -> Test Function mapping table: test_default_url, test_env_url_override, test_env_user_password, test_env_creds_file, test_constructor_override, test_connect_timeout_zero, test_connect_timeout_negative, test_reconnect_time_wait_zero, test_reconnect_time_wait_negative, test_max_reconnect_attempts_zero, test_max_reconnect_attempts_negative, test_invalid_url_scheme, test_empty_url, test_empty_name, test_user_without_password, test_env_precedence, test_instances_independent, test_dotenv_loading, test_password_masked_repr, test_password_masked_model_dump, test_creds_file_path_traversal, test_to_connect_kwargs, test_password_and_creds_mutually_exclusive.

test_default_url and test_env_url_override are decorated with @pytest.mark.smoke, matching the two @smoke-tagged BDD scenarios. Verified with 'pytest tests/test_config.py -m smoke -v' which runs exactly 2 tests and both pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: @pytest.mark.integration on the nats-py connect acceptance test
completion_promises.evidence: test_to_connect_kwargs is decorated with @pytest.mark.integration. It verifies the kwargs structure and optionally validates against nats-py Client.connect() signature if nats-py is installed.

completion_promises.criterion_text: pytest tests/test_config.py -v passes with all tests green (excluding integration)
completion_promises.evidence: 22 tests passed, 1 deselected (integration) when run with 'pytest tests/test_config.py -v -m not integration'. All green.
2 smoke tests passed, 21 deselected when run with 'pytest tests/test_config.py -m smoke -v'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: mypy tests/test_config.py passes in strict mode
completion_promises.evidence: mypy tests/test_config.py --strict reports 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: ruff check tests/test_config.py passes with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check tests/test_config.py reports 'All checks passed!'.
